title: Automated Code Refactoring
scenario: Refactor the following Python code snippet to improve its performance and readability: def calculate_total(items): total = 0 for item in items: total += item['price'] return total. The code should be refactored to use list comprehension and should be formatted according to PEP 8 guidelines.
constraints: Code should be formatted according to PEP 8 guidelines

evaluationCriteria.description: Check if the refactored code adheres to the given constraints.
Check if the refactored code improves performance.
Check if the refactored code improves readability.
Check if the refactored code is syntactically correct.
